div1.entryFree: Indies, the rich countries in the East and in the West: they shall be my East and West I. Wiv. I, 3, 79. where America, the I.? Err. III, 2, 136. Merch. I, 3, 19. more lines than is in the new map with the augmentation of the I. Tw. III, 2, 86. our king has all the I. in his arms, H8 IV, 1, 45.
